scripts.install:all: cd sdk && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../example-app && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install
scripts.start: npx concurrently -k -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgMagenta.bold" -n "SERVER,API,DASH,SITE" "npm run start:server" "npm run start:app" "npm run start:dashboard" "npm run start:frontend"
